steps.title: Identify the key definition
steps.content: The notes state that Generally, an object will heat up when twisted. This is the clearest signal of what torsional heating means.

steps.title: Apply the definition to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B directly restates that idea: torsional heating is the process by which an object increases in temperature when it is twisted.
The other choices either compare specific results, speak vaguely about change, or describe the study without defining the concept.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
